facts.fact: The yOS Program Mode candidate now includes a v0.1 Git / Mem0 / Claude API Protocol defining GitHub as operational source of truth, Mem0 as durable memory, Notion as human-readable documentation, and Claude API as review officer with no silent fallback. It remains a candidate pattern pending yOS Notion reconciliation.

The yOS Program Mode candidate includes a Handoff & Communication Protocol v0.1 defining handoffs between Founder, ChatGPT Chief Architect, Manus, Claude API, GitHub, Notion, Mem0, and future sessions, including completion, failure, repair, and cross-session handoffs.

The yOS Program Mode candidate includes a Prompt Archive & Knowledge Capture Protocol v0.1 defining how executed prompts, failed prompts, repair prompts, completion reports, lessons learned, reusable patterns, and prompt lineage should be archived and converted into durable operational knowledge.

note: Mem0 API key not configured in Manus Secrets. Import manually when API key is available.
